characters.name: REBAS
characters.description: Väike oranž rebane, suurte teravate kõrvadega, pika koheva sabaga, kandmas väikest sinist salli kaelas, uudishimulikud säravad silmad ja mänguline näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: JÄNES
characters.description: Väike hall jänes, pikkade püstakõrvadega, lühikese valge sabaga, kandmas väikest rohelist mütsi peas, suured mustad silmad ja sõbralik rõõmsameelne naeratus. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: METSARADA
locations.description: A winding forest path covered with light brown earth, surrounded by tall green pine trees and some budding deciduous trees. Sunlight filters through the tree canopy, creating dappled light on the path. Patches of bright green moss and small spring flowers are visible along the path edges. The air feels fresh and clean. Cartoon style. A large, clear puddle is located directly on the path in the middle ground, reflecting the sky and trees. The puddle should be inviting and calm.

pages.scene: Rebas and Jänes walk side-by-side on a winding forest path. Rebas is on the left, Jänes on the right. They are looking forward with curious expressions. Sunlight filters through the trees. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes continue walking on the forest path, looking up towards the bright sunlight that streams through the trees. Their faces show contentment. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes have stopped on the forest path, looking down with surprised and excited expressions at a large, clear puddle directly in front of them on the path. The puddle reflects the sky and trees. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes stand at the edge of the large puddle on the forest path, pointing at it with one paw/hand, their eyes wide with wonder at its size. The puddle reflects the sky and trees. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes are mid-air, having just jumped into the large puddle on the forest path. Water splashes up around their paws/feet. Their expressions are joyful and energetic. The puddle reflects the sky and trees. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes are landing in the large puddle, creating a big splash. Drops of water are flying high in the air around them. They are laughing with delight. The puddle reflects the sky and trees. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes are jumping again in the large puddle on the forest path, their bodies slightly wet from the splashes. They are having a wonderful time, with wide smiles. The puddle reflects the sky and trees. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes are standing in the middle of the large puddle, looking at each other and smiling broadly, clearly having a lot of fun. Small ripples are visible on the puddle surface. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes, slightly wet but full of joy, are laughing heartily while standing in the puddle. Rebas is leaning towards Jänes playfully. Their expressions are full of happiness and friendship. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.

Rebas and Jänes are walking away from the puddle, leaving a few wet paw prints behind. They are looking back at the puddle with happy, content smiles. Their fur is a little damp. The forest path has tall green pine trees and budding deciduous trees around it. Patches of moss and small spring flowers are on the path edges. Cartoon style.
